description_long: This modern bungalow features a combination of flat and gable roofs, with a mix of light wood and dark cladding on its exterior. The structure includes a two-car garage, a spacious driveway, and a large front lawn. The backyard is enclosed by a wooden fence and contains a rectangular swimming pool, a small patio area, and a patch of green lawn. Large windows and sliding glass doors provide ample natural light and connect the indoor and outdoor spaces. The property is landscaped with a few trees and shrubs, and the overall design emphasizes clean lines and open spaces. The house appears to have two stories in one section, with the rest remaining single-story.
description: A modern bungalow with flat and gable roofs, wood and dark cladding, large windows, a garage, pool, and landscaped yard.
description_view_0: Front-left view showing the main entrance, garage, pool, and patio area with landscaping.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the backyard, pool, patio, and the mix of flat and gable roofs.
description_view_2: Front view with the driveway, garage doors, main entrance, and expansive front lawn.
description_view_3: Left-side view showing the side yard, flat-roofed section, and pool area with fencing.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows and sliding glass doors
